name: Burger Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the ingredients (1-2 at a time) in a blender.
2. Turn on the blender and blend until smooth.
3. Combine the blended mixture with the remaining dry ingredients in a Tupperware container.
4. Store the mix in the refrigerator.
5. To make burgers, combine 1 cup of burger mix and 2/3 cup hot liquid (see note) and let sit for 15 minutes.
6. On a plate, form into 3 thin patties.
7. Use a spatula to move patties onto a nonstick-sprayed skillet.
8. Cook on both sides until lightly browned.
9. Serve with your favorite burger fixings.
Note - Seasonings: You can use the herbs and/or spices of your choice, or consider using a dry soup mix run through the blender (onion would be good). Also, try a dry salad dressing mix, veggie bouillon cube, onion powder, garlic powder, lemon pepper, basil, etc.
Note - Liquids: Try 1/3 cup water and 1/3 cup barbecue sauce (combine in a bowl and heat until hot), add to the dry mix. Alternatively, use half water and half tomato juice, or half water and half white wine or marsala. Ensure that your liquids and seasonings have compatible flavors.
Notes:
- Oriental: Add a little soy sauce to the liquid and some fresh ginger to the mix.
- Spanish: Use cumin, red pepper, chili powder, or a dry taco seasoning mix.
- Wine/garlic: Add chopped garlic to the mix and use half water with half white wine for the liquid.
- Potpourri: Make a batch of plain burger mix and add seasonings as desired.
